alert.details: Multiple failed logins detected | Splunk detection: Excessive Failed Logins

query_used: authentication_failure splunk multiple failed logins detected | splunk detection: excessive failed logins admin 192.168.1.50 10.0.0.10 brute force password guessing credential access
recommended_actions: Review account lockouts and authentication telemetry
Reset or rotate impacted credentials
Check for suspicious authentication success after repeated failures
Review host and account enumeration activity
Determine whether the behavior aligns with expected admin activity
usermod -L admin
iptables -A INPUT -s 192.168.1.50 -j DROP
volatility -f memory.dump --profile=Win10x64 pslist

ai_analysis.why_it_matters: This alert indicates potentially suspicious behavior that should be investigated.

ai_analysis.context: User: admin | Source IP: 192.168.1.50 | Destination IP: 10.0.0.10
